value.found_quote: Cost tracking | Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution | Anthropic only | [Costs](/en/costs)
value.rationale: The page describes "Cost tracking" offering spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution, plus a usage dashboard and an analytics dashboard with per-user metrics. However, the claim describes a specific "Spend dashboard showing daily API costs in dollars alongside user count." The page does not describe a dashboard showing daily costs in dollars displayed alongside a user count. The cost tracking capability and the per-user analytics dashboard are described as separate items, and no feature matching the specific "daily API costs in dollars alongside user count" description is mentioned.
